resultList.dtldesc: This premium 3 BHK builder floor apartment offers an exclusive and modern living experience in the tranquil and well-connected neighbourhood of Ganigarapalya, Bangalore. Designed with a focus on privacy and high-quality finishes, this residence is an ideal choice for families looking for a sophisticated home that combines contemporary aesthetics with the convenience of a well-developed urban environment.::::Property Specifications::Spanning a generous super area of 2,100 sq. ft, this apartment is meticulously designed to provide an expansive and functional living environment. The floor plan includes three spacious bedrooms, three well-appointed bathrooms, and an open-concept living and dining area that is perfect for both daily family life and hosting guests. Large, strategically placed windows allow for abundant natural light and excellent cross-ventilation, creating a bright and airy atmosphere throughout the home. High-end materials and contemporary fixtures enhance the interior, offering a polished look that is ready for immediate move-in while remaining easily customisable to suit individual design preferences.::::Facilities::The building is equipped with comprehensive facilities to ensure a comfortable and secure lifestyle for its residents. Key features include a dedicated parking space for residents, 24/7 security surveillance, and a reliable power backup system to ensure operational continuity. The common areas are exceptionally well-maintained, promoting a sense of community and providing a peaceful atmosphere. Every detail, from the building's structural integrity to the managed utility services, is designed to offer a low-maintenance and high-quality living experience.::::Locality::Ganigarapalya is a burgeoning residential locality that offers a perfect balance of quietude and connectivity. The area is well-served by a network of arterial roads, providing easy access to major employment hubs, shopping centres, and lifestyle destinations across Bangalore. Residents enjoy proximity to a variety of educational institutions, healthcare services, and essential retail outlets, ensuring that all daily necessities are conveniently located. The neighbourhood's rapid development and access to key transport infrastructure make it a highly desirable destination for those looking to invest in a premium, long-term home within the vibrant cityscape of Bangalore.
